rent.note: furnished 1BR in central Siem Reap; avg $374/mo; $250-400 range

utilities.note: electric + water + internet; Cambodia USD-based economy

groceries.note: Psah Chas market; local food extremely affordable

diningOut.note: street food under $3; mid-range restaurant $2.50-5; Pub Street area

transit.note: tuk-tuk $0.50-1.25/ride; monthly budget for local transport

coworking.source: morethantemples.com Level Up Siem Reap coworking 2026
coworking.note: Level Up Siem Reap $60/mo; AngkorHUB ~$100-150/mo range

simData.source: freakingnomads.com Siem Reap digital nomad guide
simData.note: Smart/Cellcard unlimited data SIM; cheap and effective

misc.note: gym, Angkor temple passes, entertainment, personal care, buffer

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers applied to RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base. Raise for peak tourist/weather months, lower for off-peak.

evidence.claim: Siem Reap average rent $374/month; total monthly costs ~$715-$853
evidence.quote: Monthly rent costs average $374 per month. A single person's monthly costs are approximately $853

evidence.claim: Level Up Siem Reap coworking $60/month with coffee/drinks included
evidence.quote: Level Up Siem Reap offers a monthly membership for $60 USD as of January 2026, with basic passes including unlimited tea, coffee, drinks from their soda fountain
Street food meals cost under $3, with mid-range restaurant meals ranging from $2.50 - $5 USD per meal

evidence.claim: Siem Reap monthly living costs often under $1,000 for nomads
evidence.quote: monthly living costs are often under $1,000
